context: Tests whether the agent avoids verifying behavior through external means (direct DB queries in tests), uses the module's own public interface to assert outcomes, and designs the interface to accept dependencies for testability.

checklist.name: Interface-only verification
checklist.description: Tests verify outcomes using only the repository's public methods (e.g. getUser, listUsers) — NOT by querying the database directly (no raw SQL queries or direct DB object access in test assertions)

checklist.name: No direct DB access in tests
checklist.description: Test file does NOT import or use the database connection directly for assertions (no db.query(), db.get(), db.run() calls in test assertion blocks)

checklist.name: Dependency injection
checklist.description: UserRepository accepts the database/storage as a constructor parameter or function parameter, rather than creating it internally

checklist.name: Tests describe retrievability
checklist.description: Tests verify that saved records are retrievable through the interface (e.g. 'user created with createUser is returned by getUser') not that data was persisted to a table

checklist.name: Behavior-named tests
checklist.description: Test names describe behaviors observable to callers (e.g. 'newly created user is retrievable by ID') not storage operations (e.g. 'createUser inserts row into users table')

checklist.name: Public interface small
checklist.description: Repository exposes a small number of public methods covering the core operations — no internal helpers exposed in the public API

checklist.name: Returns results
checklist.description: Repository methods return values (e.g. the created user, a list of users) rather than only producing side effects with void returns

checklist.name: Design notes explain interface testing
checklist.description: design-notes.md explicitly contrasts verifying through the interface vs. bypassing it with direct DB queries

checklist.name: In-memory storage for tests
checklist.description: Tests use an in-memory or lightweight store — no connection to a real external database server required

checklist.name: One assertion per test
checklist.description: Each test has one logical assertion — verifying one observable outcome per test case
